description: GASSIT - Web-based rental management platform for Laer Firmengruppe. Full lifecycle: applications, contracts, invoicing, payments (Mollie), dunning, damage, termination. Vue.js + Laravel + MySQL. GDPR-compliant. 7 RBAC roles. Multi-park.

userStories.title: Database schema: users, roles, parks, park_user assignments
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the core auth and multi-park schema so all other tables can reference it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create users table: id, name, email, password, role (enum: admin|main_manager|rental_manager|park_worker|accountant|office_worker|customer_service), active, timestamps
Create parks table: id, name, address, city, zip, country, phone, email, bank_account, logo_path, timestamps
Create park_user pivot table: user_id, park_id (admin/main_manager have implicit access to all parks)
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: unit types, units, unit statuses
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the unit and unit-type tables so rental inventory can be managed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create unit_types table: id, park_id, name, description, base_rent, deposit_amount, size_m2, timestamps
Create units table: id, park_id, unit_type_id, unit_number, floor, building, size_m2, status (enum: free|reserved|rented|maintenance|inactive), timestamps
Create unit_photos table: id, unit_id, path, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: customers and blacklist
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the customer and blacklist tables so tenant profiles can be stored.
acceptanceCriteria: Create customers table: id, type (private|company), first_name, last_name, company_name, dob, address, city, zip, country, email, phone, id_number, tax_id, status (enum: new|tenant|not_renting|debtor|troublemaker|blacklisted), gdpr_consent_at, timestamps, soft deletes
Create blacklist table: id, customer_id, reason, added_by (user_id), added_at, removed_at, timestamps
Create customer_documents table: id, customer_id, type, path, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: applications and waiting list
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the application and waiting list tables so the intake process can be tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create applications table: id, park_id, customer_id, unit_type_id, unit_id (nullable), desired_start_date, status (enum: new|in_progress|waiting|completed), assigned_to (user_id), credit_check_path, notes, timestamps
Create waiting_list table: id, park_id, customer_id, unit_type_id, priority_score, notified_at, converted_at, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: contracts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the contracts table so rental agreements can be tracked from draft to termination.
acceptanceCriteria: Create contracts table: id, application_id, customer_id, unit_id, start_date, end_date (nullable), rent_amount, deposit_amount, insurance_amount, status (enum: draft|awaiting_signature|signed|active|terminated_by_customer|terminated_by_lfg|declined), signed_pdf_path, signed_at, terminated_at, termination_reason, timestamps
Create contract_signatures table: id, contract_id, signer_type (customer|lfg), signed_at, ip_address, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: invoices, invoice items, payments
userStories.description: As a developer, I need invoice and payment tables so billing and reconciliation can be tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create invoices table: id, contract_id, customer_id, park_id, invoice_number, issue_date, due_date, total_amount, status (enum: draft|sent|paid|overdue|cancelled), pdf_path, timestamps
Create invoice_items table: id, invoice_id, description, quantity, unit_price, total, type (enum: rent|deposit|insurance|electricity|damage|dunning_fee|other)
Create payments table: id, invoice_id, amount, method, mollie_payment_id, status (enum: pending|paid|failed|refunded), paid_at, timestamps
Create dunning_levels table: id, invoice_id, level (1|2|3), sent_at, fee_amount, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: damage reports, electricity meters, tasks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need damage, metering, and task tables to cover operational workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Create damage_reports table: id, unit_id, contract_id (nullable), reported_by (user_id), description, estimated_cost, status (enum: reported|in_assessment|repair_ordered|resolved), resolved_at, timestamps
Create damage_photos table: id, damage_report_id, path, timestamps
Create electricity_readings table: id, unit_id, reading_date, reading_value, photo_path, recorded_by (user_id), timestamps

Create tasks table: id, park_id, type (enum: application|damage|ticket|general), title, description, assigned_to (user_id), status (enum: todo|in_progress|done), due_date, priority (enum: low|medium|high), related_id, related_type, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Database schema: mail templates, audit log, reference tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need mail template, audit, and reference data tables to complete the schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Create mail_templates table: id, park_id (nullable), name, subject, body_html, type (enum: document|mail), variables_json, timestamps
Create audit_logs table: id, user_id, action, model_type, model_id, old_values_json, new_values_json, ip_address, timestamps
Create reference_items table: id, category (country|city|document_type|termination_reason|damage_category|unit_feature), value, label, active, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Laravel auth: JWT login, logout, 2FA, password reset
userStories.description: As any user, I want secure login with optional 2FA so unauthorized access is prevented.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token on valid credentials
POST /api/auth/logout invalidates token
POST /api/auth/password-reset sends reset email
2FA via TOTP: POST /api/auth/2fa/setup and /api/auth/2fa/verify
Account locked after 5 failed attempts (configurable)
RBAC middleware applied: role checked on every protected route
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin: User & employee CRUD API
userStories.description: As an Admin, I want to create, edit, and deactivate users so access is controlled.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/users (Admin only)
GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/employees (Admin only)
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/parks assigns parks to user
All mutations logged to audit_logs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Park management API (CRUD + settings)
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want to manage park profiles via API so each location is fully configured.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/parks (scoped to user's parks), POST /api/parks, PUT /api/parks/{id}, DELETE /api/parks/{id}
Upload park logo: POST /api/parks/{id}/logo stores to S3-compatible storage
Park settings: bank account, contact, opening hours stored
Mutations logged to audit_logs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Unit management API (CRUD + status transitions)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want unit CRUD and status management via API so inventory is always current.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/parks/{parkId}/units
PUT /api/units/{id}/status transitions status with validation (no direct free→rented without contract)
POST /api/units/{id}/photos uploads photos to storage
GET /api/units/{id}/history returns rental history
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Customer API (CRUD, GDPR, blacklist)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want customer CRUD and GDPR controls via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/customers (scoped to park)
POST /api/customers/{id}/gdpr-delete anonymizes PII fields, retains financial records
POST/DELETE /api/customers/{id}/blacklist manages blacklist entry
GET /api/customers/{id}/documents lists and downloads attached documents
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Application workflow API (intake, status, credit check)
userStories.description: As an Office Worker or Rental Manager, I want application CRUD and status transitions via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/applications (scoped to park)
PUT /api/applications/{id}/status transitions: new→in_progress→waiting→completed with validation
POST /api/applications/{id}/credit-check calls Credit Bureau API and stores PDF result
POST /api/applications/{id}/assign assigns to user
POST /api/applications/{id}/convert-to-waiting-list moves to waiting list
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Contract API (generate, e-sign, status transitions)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want contract generation and e-signature flow via API.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/applications/{id}/contract generates draft contract PDF from template
POST /api/contracts/{id}/send-for-signature sends to e-sign provider, status → awaiting_signature
Webhook POST /api/webhooks/esign/{contractId} receives signature event, stores signed PDF, status → signed
PUT /api/contracts/{id}/activate sets status → active, unit status → rented
PUT /api/contracts/{id}/terminate processes termination with reason and date
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invoice generation API (auto monthly + manual)
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want invoices generated automatically and manually via API.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/invoices/generate-monthly triggers generation for all active contracts (queued job)
POST /api/invoices creates manual invoice with line items
GET/PUT/DELETE /api/invoices, GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf
Invoice number auto-incremented per park per year (e.g. LFG-2026-0001)
POST /api/invoices/{id}/send emails PDF to customer
GET /api/invoices/datev-export?from=&to= returns EXTF CSV
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mollie payment integration (links, webhooks, reconciliation)
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want Mollie payment links generated and webhooks processed so payments are reconciled automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/invoices/{id}/payment-link creates Mollie payment and returns checkout URL
POST /api/webhooks/mollie processes payment status events idempotently
On successful payment: invoice status → paid, payment record created
On failed payment: retry logic triggered (configurable max retries)
GET /api/payments lists all payments with filter by park/date/status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Dunning (Mahnstuffe) automation API
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want overdue invoices escalated through dunning levels automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduled job daily: finds overdue invoices and escalates dunning level per configured delay (Level 1: +7d, Level 2: +14d, Level 3: +30d)
Each escalation: creates dunning_level record, adds dunning fee to invoice, sends email using dunning mail template
GET /api/debtors returns all customers with open debt, grouped by dunning level
POST /api/debtors/{customerId}/pause pauses dunning for customer
POST /api/debtors/{customerId}/escalate manually escalates to next level
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Damage reports API and electricity metering API
userStories.description: As a Park Worker, I want to file damage reports and record electricity readings via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT /api/damage-reports (scoped to park)
POST /api/damage-reports/{id}/photos uploads photos to storage
PUT /api/damage-reports/{id}/status transitions with validation
POST /api/damage-reports/{id}/invoice generates damage invoice for tenant
POST /api/units/{id}/electricity-readings records meter reading with photo
GET /api/units/{id}/electricity-readings returns history with computed consumption and charge
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Task management API (Kanban CRUD)
userStories.description: As any manager, I want task CRUD with status transitions via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/tasks (scoped to park, filtered by assigned_to for park_worker role)
PUT /api/tasks/{id}/status transitions: todo→in_progress→done
GET /api/tasks/dashboard returns tasks for Kanban widget (own tasks only for non-managers)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mail templates API and mass mailing queue
userStories.description: As an Office Worker, I want to manage mail templates and send mass mailings via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/mail-templates
POST /api/mail/send sends individual email from template with variable substitution to a customer
POST /api/mail/mass-send queues mass mailing with recipient filter (park, status, contract_type)
POST /api/mail/schedule schedules a mass mailing for future delivery
GET /api/mail/sent returns sent mail log with delivery status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Reports API (applications, customers, units, finance)
userStories.description: As a Main Manager or Accountant, I want report endpoints returning aggregated data for all key modules.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/reports/applications?park_id=&from=&to= returns conversion rate, avg processing time
GET /api/reports/customers?park_id=&from=&to= returns churn, new/active/inactive counts by month
GET /api/reports/units?park_id= returns occupancy rate, avg rent per m², vacancy duration
GET /api/reports/finance?park_id=&from=&to= returns revenue vs plan, outstanding debt by payment method
All endpoints support ?format=xlsx for Excel download
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Dashboard KPI API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single dashboard endpoint that returns all KPI values for the dashboard widgets.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/dashboard/kpis?park_id= returns: new_requests, new_customers, new_invoices, free_units, ongoing_contracts, cancellations, problem_clients, inactive_units, debtors_count, dunning_level_count, damages_count, repair_jobs_count
GET /api/dashboard/mahnstuffe?park_id= returns debtor table rows with customer, amount, level, days_overdue
GET /api/dashboard/new-invoices?park_id= returns recent invoices table
GET /api/dashboard/revenue?park_id= returns planned vs actual revenue per park
KPIs cached with 30-second TTL
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Vue.js app scaffold: routing, auth store, RBAC guards, layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Vue.js SPA skeleton with auth, routing, and the main layout before building screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Vue 3 + Vite + Pinia + Vue Router project initialized
Auth store: login/logout actions, JWT stored in httpOnly cookie or localStorage, user/role state
Route guards: redirect to /login if unauthenticated; redirect to /403 if role lacks permission
Main layout: sidebar nav matching menu structure (Dashboard, Workroom, Request, Customer, Units, Park, Finance, Reports, Mail, Settings, Admin), top bar with user info and logout
Sidebar items hidden/shown per role
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Login page UI
userStories.description: As any user, I want a login form with email/password and 2FA so I can access the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page at /login with email + password fields, submit button
On success: redirect to /dashboard
On failure: show error message
If 2FA required: show TOTP input step after password
Forgot password link leads to /password-reset with email field
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dashboard page UI (KPI cards, tables, Kanban, calendar)
userStories.description: As a manager, I want the dashboard screen showing all KPI widgets from the mockup.
acceptanceCriteria: KPI card grid: Anfragen, Neue Kunden, Neue Factura, Freie Einheiten, Im Gange, Kündigung, Problem Clients, Inaktive Einheiten, Schuldner, Mahnstuffe, Mangel, Schrauber — each with count from /api/dashboard/kpis
Mahnstuffe table: customer name, amount, dunning level badge, days overdue — data from /api/dashboard/mahnstuffe
Neue Factura table: invoice number, customer, amount, status badge — from /api/dashboard/new-invoices
Park revenue table: park name, planned, actual, delta — from /api/dashboard/revenue
Aufgaben Kanban: 3-column board (Todo/In Progress/Done) from /api/tasks/dashboard
Calendar widget showing upcoming events (contract start/end dates, task due dates)
Park selector dropdown filters all widgets
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

Application detail page: customer info, status stepper (New→In Progress→Waiting→Completed), assigned user, credit check button, document attachments
